name: extract_adjuster_notes_features
description: Extract structured features from initial adjuster notes for claim setup and early assessment

structured_features.description: Structured features from initial adjuster notes

initial_reserve_amount.description: Initial total reserve amount set by adjuster in dollars

medical_reserve_amount.description: Medical portion of initial reserve in dollars

indemnity_reserve_amount.description: Indemnity/wage loss portion of initial reserve in dollars

reserve_adequacy_assessment.description: Adjuster's assessment of whether initial reserves are adequate for expected costs

liability_determination.description: Initial liability determination: clear (accepted), disputed (under investigation), or denied

coverage_issues.description: Severity of coverage problems identified: none (covered), minor (small issues), major (significant coverage concerns)

investigation_actions_required.description: Number of investigation steps or actions identified as necessary

legal_involvement_potential.description: Likelihood of legal representation or litigation

treating_physician_specialty.description: Type of treating physician (e.g., primary care, orthopedic specialist, pain management)

diagnostic_tests_ordered.description: Diagnostic tests requested or completed (e.g., 'MRI, X-ray, CT scan')

treatment_protocol.description: Approach to treatment: conservative (minimal intervention) or aggressive (intensive treatment)

subrogation_potential.description: Potential for subrogation recovery from third parties

third_party_involvement.description: Whether third parties are involved in the incident

legal_representation.description: Whether claimant has retained legal representation

red_flags.description: Any red flags or concerns noted by adjuster (e.g., inconsistent statements, prior claims history, delayed reporting)

recommended_actions.description: Adjuster's recommended next actions for claim handling

narrative_analysis.description: Rich text analysis (500-1000 characters) covering: (1) Adjuster's initial assessment and concerns, (2) Key claim handling issues identified, (3) Reserve rationale and adequacy, (4) Investigation needs and recommended claim strategy

overall_confidence.description: Confidence in extracted information from adjuster notes

data_quality.description: Quality and completeness of adjuster documentation

missing_information.description: Information not yet documented by adjuster
